title: User Detail and Setup
description: Detail view for a single user within a tenant. Displays platform identity data and VistA File 200 attributes (keys, menu options, person class, security keys). VistA user attributes are read-only from platform perspective. Role/key assignment posture requires research into which VistA RPCs support programmatic key assignment.

dataSources.description: VistA user record detail — keys, menu options, person class. Read-only mirror.
Platform identity attributes and role assignments.
